title: Molten Spicy Australian Duck with Pistachio Wrap
description: A spicy, molten Australian dish featuring pistachio and nuka-pickle, served in a ti-leaf wrap.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt and black pepper, and cook for 5 minutes on each side.
Transfer the duck to a baking sheet and roast for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked to your liking.
Meanwhile, warm the ti-leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Spread a tablespoon of olive oil on each wrap, then top with a spoonful of spicy nuka-pickle relish.
Place a cooked duck breast on each wrap, followed by a spoonful of fresh pistachio pesto.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the top of each wrap.
Place the wraps under the broiler for 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
